gates.n20: stress_sum > 0, stress_pf >= 1.20, hard_sum > 0, hard_pf >= 1.05, leave_best positive under both costs, at least 5 symbols, best positive symbol share <= 45%, both halves positive
gates.n40: stress_sum > 0, stress_pf >= 1.30, hard_sum > 0, hard_pf >= 1.15, leave_best positive under both costs, at least 8 symbols, best positive symbol share <= 35%, both halves positive, at least 4 of 6 folds positive

promotion_policy: No automatic promotion. Passing n40 only permits manual review for one new exact-shadow lane. Real trading remains blocked.
